content: NATS JetStream WorkQueuePolicy: each message consumed only once, enforced by allowing only ONE consumer per subject (no overlapping consumer filters). Acked messages deleted from stream. MaxDeliver caps redelivery; messages hitting MaxDeliver STAY in stream and must be manually deleted (no auto-DLQ). Backoff array overrides AckWait entirely. NAK with delay supported via nakWithDelay. AckTerm (+TERM) stops redelivery without acking (poison messages). Nats-Msg-Id header + DuplicateWindow (default 2min) gives publish-side idempotency (exactly-once publish). MaxMsgsPerSubject + DiscardNewPerSubject (since 2.9) enforces per-subject queue depth at the broker — native backpressure.
